packageRules.description: Microsoft.OpenApi is pinned to 2.x (see Directory.Packages.props): 3.x makes IOpenApiMediaType.Example read-only, which the Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi XML-comment source generator (latest 10.0.9) still assigns — CS0200 in generated code we must not hand-edit. Re-proposed twice (#462 reverted, #465 closed); re-enable majors once ASP.NET's generator supports OpenAPI.NET v3.

js-yaml appears only as an npm overrides security floor (^4.2.0, from #406); its openapi-typescript→@redocly/openapi-core consumer declares ^4.x. Forcing a v5 major through overrides pushes an out-of-range API (breaking dump/quoteStyle changes) into build tooling for zero security gain (npm audit clean). #425 closed on this basis; majors here should follow the consumer, not lead it.
